title: agrostis vulgaris var. pallida
intro: Agrostis vulgaris var. pallida, also known as pale bent or pale meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Agrostis genus and is commonly found in meadows and grasslands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin. The health benefits of Agrostis vulgaris var. pallida include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a useful remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Agrostis vulgaris var. pallida can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
